query: select      cd_gender,     cd_marital_status,     cd_education_status,     hd_vehicle_count,     count(*) as cnt from     store_sales,     web_sales,     date_dim d1,     date_dim d2,     customer,     inventory,     store,     warehouse,     item,     customer_demographics,     household_demographics,     customer_address     where       ss_item_sk = i_item_sk       and ws_item_sk = ss_item_sk       and ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk       and ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk 			and d2.d_date between d1.d_date and (d1.d_date + interval '30' day)       and ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk       and ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk       and ws_warehouse_sk = inv_warehouse_sk       and ws_warehouse_sk = w_warehouse_sk       and inv_item_sk = ss_item_sk       and inv_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk       and inv_quantity_on_hand >= ss_quantity       and s_state = w_state       AND i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')       and i_manager_id IN (3, 15, 17, 26, 43, 44, 55, 70, 82, 95)       and c_current_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk       and c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk       and c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk       and ca_state in ('IN', 'LA', 'NE', 'NM', 'OH')       and d1.d_year = 2001       and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100     group by cd_gender, cd_marital_status, cd_education_status, hd_vehicle_count     order by cnt     ;
rewritten_query:
SELECT
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    hd_vehicle_count,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM store_sales
JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN web_sales ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = store_sales.ss_item_sk
    AND web_sales.ws_bill_customer_sk = store_sales.ss_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim d1 ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
JOIN date_dim d2 ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
JOIN inventory ON inventory.inv_item_sk = store_sales.ss_item_sk
    AND inventory.inv_date_sk = store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk
    AND inventory.inv_warehouse_sk = web_sales.ws_warehouse_sk
JOIN warehouse ON web_sales.ws_warehouse_sk = warehouse.w_warehouse_sk
JOIN store ON store.s_state = warehouse.w_state
JOIN customer_demographics ON customer.c_current_cdemo_sk = customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk
JOIN household_demographics ON customer.c_current_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
JOIN customer_address ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
WHERE d2.d_date BETWEEN d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + INTERVAL '30' DAY)
    AND inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand >= store_sales.ss_quantity
    AND item.i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')
    AND item.i_manager_id IN (3, 15, 17, 26, 43, 44, 55, 70, 82, 95)
    AND customer_address.ca_state IN ('IN', 'LA', 'NE', 'NM', 'OH')
    AND d1.d_year = 2001
    AND web_sales.ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100
GROUP BY cd_gender, cd_marital_status, cd_education_status, hd_vehicle_count
ORDER BY cnt;

query: select      cd_gender,     cd_marital_status,     cd_education_status,     hd_vehicle_count,     count(*) as cnt from     store_sales,     web_sales,     date_dim d1,     date_dim d2,     customer,     inventory,     store,     warehouse,     item,     customer_demographics,     household_demographics,     customer_address     where       ss_item_sk = i_item_sk       and ws_item_sk = ss_item_sk       and ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk       and ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk 			and d2.d_date between d1.d_date and (d1.d_date + interval '30' day)       and ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk       and ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk       and ws_warehouse_sk = inv_warehouse_sk       and ws_warehouse_sk = w_warehouse_sk       and inv_item_sk = ss_item_sk       and inv_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk       and inv_quantity_on_hand >= ss_quantity       and s_state = w_state       AND i_category IN ('Electronics', 'Jewelry', 'Music')       and i_manager_id IN (6, 10, 21, 31, 34, 57, 70, 73, 85, 96)       and c_current_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk       and c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk       and c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk       and ca_state in ('FL', 'MO', 'PA', 'SC', 'TX')       and d1.d_year = 2001       and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 31 AND 51     group by cd_gender, cd_marital_status, cd_education_status, hd_vehicle_count     order by cnt     ;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_items AS (
    SELECT i_item_sk, i_category, i_manager_id
    FROM item
    WHERE i_category IN ('Electronics', 'Jewelry', 'Music')
    AND i_manager_id IN (6, 10, 21, 31, 34, 57, 70, 73, 85, 96)
),
filtered_dates_d1 AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk, d_date
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 2001
),
filtered_addresses AS (
    SELECT ca_address_sk, ca_state
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_state IN ('FL', 'MO', 'PA', 'SC', 'TX')
)
SELECT 
    cd.cd_gender, 
    cd.cd_marital_status, 
    cd.cd_education_status, 
    hd.hd_vehicle_count, 
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM 
    store_sales ss
INNER JOIN filtered_items i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
INNER JOIN filtered_dates_d1 d1 ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
INNER JOIN inventory inv ON ss.ss_item_sk = inv.inv_item_sk 
    AND ss.ss_sold_date_sk = inv.inv_date_sk 
    AND inv.inv_quantity_on_hand >= ss.ss_quantity
INNER JOIN web_sales ws ON ss.ss_item_sk = ws.ws_item_sk 
    AND inv.inv_warehouse_sk = ws.ws_warehouse_sk
    AND ws.ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 31 AND 51
INNER JOIN date_dim d2 ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk 
    AND d2.d_date BETWEEN d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + INTERVAL '30' DAY)
INNER JOIN warehouse w ON ws.ws_warehouse_sk = w.w_warehouse_sk
INNER JOIN store s ON s.s_state = w.w_state
INNER JOIN customer c ON ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk 
    AND ws.ws_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
INNER JOIN filtered_addresses ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
INNER JOIN customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
INNER JOIN household_demographics hd ON c.c_current_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
GROUP BY 
    cd.cd_gender, 
    cd.cd_marital_status, 
    cd.cd_education_status, 
    hd.hd_vehicle_count
ORDER BY 
    cnt;

query: select      cd_gender,     cd_marital_status,     cd_education_status,     hd_vehicle_count,     count(*) as cnt from     store_sales,     web_sales,     date_dim d1,     date_dim d2,     customer,     inventory,     store,     warehouse,     item,     customer_demographics,     household_demographics,     customer_address     where       ss_item_sk = i_item_sk       and ws_item_sk = ss_item_sk       and ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk       and ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk 			and d2.d_date between d1.d_date and (d1.d_date + interval '30' day)       and ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk       and ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk       and ws_warehouse_sk = inv_warehouse_sk       and ws_warehouse_sk = w_warehouse_sk       and inv_item_sk = ss_item_sk       and inv_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk       and inv_quantity_on_hand >= ss_quantity       and s_state = w_state       AND i_category IN ('Books', 'Children', 'Men')       and i_manager_id IN (9, 24, 27, 41, 59, 66, 78, 80, 83, 100)       and c_current_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk       and c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk       and c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk       and ca_state in ('AL', 'MI', 'MS', 'OH', 'TX')       and d1.d_year = 2001       and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 8 AND 28     group by cd_gender, cd_marital_status, cd_education_status, hd_vehicle_count     order by cnt     ;
rewritten_query:
SELECT
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    hd_vehicle_count,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM store_sales
INNER JOIN web_sales ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = web_sales.ws_item_sk
INNER JOIN date_dim d1 ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
INNER JOIN date_dim d2 ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
INNER JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
    AND web_sales.ws_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
INNER JOIN inventory ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = inventory.inv_item_sk
    AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = inventory.inv_date_sk
INNER JOIN warehouse ON web_sales.ws_warehouse_sk = warehouse.w_warehouse_sk
INNER JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
INNER JOIN customer_demographics ON customer.c_current_cdemo_sk = customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk
INNER JOIN household_demographics ON customer.c_current_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
INNER JOIN customer_address ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
WHERE
    d2.d_date BETWEEN d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + INTERVAL '30' DAY)
    AND inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand >= store_sales.ss_quantity
    AND item.i_category IN ('Books', 'Children', 'Men')
    AND item.i_manager_id IN (9, 24, 27, 41, 59, 66, 78, 80, 83, 100)
    AND customer_address.ca_state IN ('AL', 'MI', 'MS', 'OH', 'TX')
    AND d1.d_year = 2001
    AND web_sales.ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 8 AND 28
GROUP BY
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    hd_vehicle_count
ORDER BY cnt;

query: with customer_total_return as (select sr_customer_sk as ctr_customer_sk ,sr_store_sk as ctr_store_sk ,sr_reason_sk as ctr_reason_sk ,sum(SR_REFUNDED_CASH) as ctr_total_return from store_returns ,date_dim where sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk and d_year =2001 and sr_return_amt / sr_return_quantity between 236 and 295 group by sr_customer_sk ,sr_store_sk, sr_reason_sk)  select  c_customer_id from customer_total_return ctr1 ,store ,customer ,customer_demographics where ctr1.ctr_total_return > (select avg(ctr_total_return)*1.2 from customer_total_return ctr2 where ctr1.ctr_store_sk = ctr2.ctr_store_sk ) and ctr1.ctr_reason_sk BETWEEN 28 AND 31 and s_store_sk = ctr1.ctr_store_sk and s_state IN ('MI', 'NC', 'WI') and ctr1.ctr_customer_sk = c_customer_sk and c_current_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk and cd_marital_status IN ('W', 'W') and cd_education_status IN ('4 yr Degree', 'College') and cd_gender = 'M' and c_birth_month = 5 and c_birth_year BETWEEN 1950 AND 1956 order by c_customer_id limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_store_returns AS (
    SELECT sr_customer_sk, sr_store_sk, sr_reason_sk, SR_REFUNDED_CASH
    FROM store_returns
    JOIN date_dim ON sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_year = 2001
      AND sr_return_quantity > 0
      AND sr_return_amt / sr_return_quantity BETWEEN 236 AND 295
      AND sr_reason_sk BETWEEN 28 AND 31
),
customer_total_return AS (
    SELECT sr_customer_sk AS ctr_customer_sk,
           sr_store_sk AS ctr_store_sk,
           sr_reason_sk AS ctr_reason_sk,
           SUM(SR_REFUNDED_CASH) AS ctr_total_return
    FROM filtered_store_returns
    GROUP BY sr_customer_sk, sr_store_sk, sr_reason_sk
),
store_averages AS (
    SELECT ctr_store_sk,
           AVG(ctr_total_return) * 1.2 AS avg_total
    FROM customer_total_return
    GROUP BY ctr_store_sk
),
filtered_customers AS (
    SELECT c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_current_cdemo_sk
    FROM customer
    WHERE c_birth_month = 5
      AND c_birth_year BETWEEN 1950 AND 1956
)
SELECT c_customer_id
FROM customer_total_return ctr1
JOIN store_averages sa ON ctr1.ctr_store_sk = sa.ctr_store_sk
JOIN store ON ctr1.ctr_store_sk = store.s_store_sk AND store.s_state IN ('MI', 'NC', 'WI')
JOIN filtered_customers c ON ctr1.ctr_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
JOIN customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
WHERE ctr1.ctr_total_return > sa.avg_total
  AND cd.cd_marital_status = 'W'
  AND cd.cd_education_status IN ('4 yr Degree', 'College')
  AND cd.cd_gender = 'M'
ORDER BY c_customer_id
LIMIT 100;

query: with customer_total_return as (select sr_customer_sk as ctr_customer_sk ,sr_store_sk as ctr_store_sk ,sr_reason_sk as ctr_reason_sk ,sum(SR_RETURN_AMT) as ctr_total_return from store_returns ,date_dim where sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk and d_year =2001 and sr_return_amt / sr_return_quantity between 182 and 241 group by sr_customer_sk ,sr_store_sk, sr_reason_sk)  select  c_customer_id from customer_total_return ctr1 ,store ,customer ,customer_demographics where ctr1.ctr_total_return > (select avg(ctr_total_return)*1.2 from customer_total_return ctr2 where ctr1.ctr_store_sk = ctr2.ctr_store_sk ) and ctr1.ctr_reason_sk BETWEEN 24 AND 27 and s_store_sk = ctr1.ctr_store_sk and s_state IN ('IA', 'NE', 'TX') and ctr1.ctr_customer_sk = c_customer_sk and c_current_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk and cd_marital_status IN ('S', 'U') and cd_education_status IN ('Secondary', '4 yr Degree') and cd_gender = 'F' and c_birth_month = 6 and c_birth_year BETWEEN 1934 AND 1940 order by c_customer_id limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH customer_total_return AS (
    SELECT 
        sr_customer_sk AS ctr_customer_sk,
        sr_store_sk AS ctr_store_sk,
        sr_reason_sk AS ctr_reason_sk,
        SUM(SR_RETURN_AMT) AS ctr_total_return
    FROM 
        store_returns 
        JOIN date_dim ON sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE 
        d_year = 2001
        AND sr_return_amt >= 182 * sr_return_quantity
        AND sr_return_amt <= 241 * sr_return_quantity
        AND sr_reason_sk BETWEEN 24 AND 27
    GROUP BY 
        sr_customer_sk, 
        sr_store_sk, 
        sr_reason_sk
), 
store_avg_return AS (
    SELECT 
        ctr_store_sk,
        AVG(ctr_total_return) * 1.2 AS threshold_return
    FROM 
        customer_total_return
    GROUP BY 
        ctr_store_sk
)
SELECT 
    c_customer_id 
FROM 
    customer_total_return ctr1
    JOIN store_avg_return sar ON ctr1.ctr_store_sk = sar.ctr_store_sk
    JOIN store ON ctr1.ctr_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
    JOIN customer ON ctr1.ctr_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_demographics ON customer.c_current_cdemo_sk = customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk
WHERE 
    ctr1.ctr_total_return > sar.threshold_return
    AND store.s_state IN ('IA', 'NE', 'TX') 
    AND customer_demographics.cd_marital_status IN ('S', 'U') 
    AND customer_demographics.cd_education_status IN ('Secondary', '4 yr Degree') 
    AND customer_demographics.cd_gender = 'F' 
    AND customer.c_birth_month = 6 
    AND customer.c_birth_year BETWEEN 1934 AND 1940 
ORDER BY 
    c_customer_id 
LIMIT 100;

query: with customer_total_return as (select sr_customer_sk as ctr_customer_sk ,sr_store_sk as ctr_store_sk ,sr_reason_sk as ctr_reason_sk ,sum(SR_STORE_CREDIT) as ctr_total_return from store_returns ,date_dim where sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk and d_year =2000 and sr_return_amt / sr_return_quantity between 107 and 166 group by sr_customer_sk ,sr_store_sk, sr_reason_sk)  select  c_customer_id from customer_total_return ctr1 ,store ,customer ,customer_demographics where ctr1.ctr_total_return > (select avg(ctr_total_return)*1.2 from customer_total_return ctr2 where ctr1.ctr_store_sk = ctr2.ctr_store_sk ) and ctr1.ctr_reason_sk BETWEEN 17 AND 20 and s_store_sk = ctr1.ctr_store_sk and s_state IN ('MO', 'NC', 'PA') and ctr1.ctr_customer_sk = c_customer_sk and c_current_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk and cd_marital_status IN ('D', 'W') and cd_education_status IN ('College', 'Unknown') and cd_gender = 'F' and c_birth_month = 5 and c_birth_year BETWEEN 1956 AND 1962 order by c_customer_id limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH customer_total_return AS (
    SELECT sr_customer_sk AS ctr_customer_sk,
           sr_store_sk AS ctr_store_sk,
           sr_reason_sk AS ctr_reason_sk,
           sum(SR_STORE_CREDIT) AS ctr_total_return
    FROM store_returns
    JOIN date_dim ON sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_year = 2000
      AND sr_return_quantity > 0
      AND sr_return_amt BETWEEN 107 * sr_return_quantity AND 166 * sr_return_quantity
    GROUP BY sr_customer_sk, sr_store_sk, sr_reason_sk
),
store_averages AS (
    SELECT ctr_store_sk,
           AVG(ctr_total_return) * 1.2 AS avg_total
    FROM customer_total_return
    GROUP BY ctr_store_sk
)
SELECT c_customer_id
FROM customer_total_return ctr1
JOIN store_averages sa ON ctr1.ctr_store_sk = sa.ctr_store_sk
JOIN store ON ctr1.ctr_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
JOIN customer ON ctr1.ctr_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
JOIN customer_demographics ON customer.c_current_cdemo_sk = customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk
WHERE ctr1.ctr_reason_sk BETWEEN 17 AND 20
  AND store.s_state IN ('MO', 'NC', 'PA')
  AND customer_demographics.cd_marital_status IN ('D', 'W')
  AND customer_demographics.cd_education_status IN ('College', 'Unknown')
  AND customer_demographics.cd_gender = 'F'
  AND customer.c_birth_month = 5
  AND customer.c_birth_year BETWEEN 1956 AND 1962
  AND ctr1.ctr_total_return > sa.avg_total
ORDER BY c_customer_id
LIMIT 100;

query: select min(c_customer_sk), min(ss_item_sk), min(sr_ticket_number), min(ws_order_number) FROM store_sales, store_returns, web_sales, date_dim d1, date_dim d2, item, customer, customer_address, household_demographics WHERE ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number AND ss_customer_sk = ws_bill_customer_sk AND ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk AND c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk AND c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk AND sr_item_sk = ws_item_sk AND i_item_sk = ss_item_sk AND i_category IN ('Books', 'Shoes', 'Sports') AND sr_returned_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk AND ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk AND d2.d_date between d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + interval '90' day) AND ca_state in ('IN', 'MT', 'NM', 'OH', 'OR') AND d1.d_year = 1999 AND hd_income_band_sk BETWEEN 14 AND 20 AND hd_buy_potential = '5001-10000' AND ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 80 * 0.01 AND 100 * 0.01 ;
rewritten_query:
WITH d1_filtered AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk, d_date, d_date + INTERVAL '90' DAY AS end_date
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 1999
),
item_filtered AS (
    SELECT i_item_sk
    FROM item
    WHERE i_category IN ('Books', 'Shoes', 'Sports')
),
hd_filtered AS (
    SELECT hd_demo_sk
    FROM household_demographics
    WHERE hd_income_band_sk BETWEEN 14 AND 20
    AND hd_buy_potential = '5001-10000'
),
ca_filtered AS (
    SELECT ca_address_sk
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_state IN ('IN', 'MT', 'NM', 'OH', 'OR')
)
SELECT min(c_customer_sk), min(ss_item_sk), min(sr_ticket_number), min(ws_order_number)
FROM store_returns sr
INNER JOIN d1_filtered d1 ON sr.sr_returned_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
INNER JOIN item_filtered i ON sr.sr_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
INNER JOIN store_sales ss ON sr.sr_item_sk = ss.ss_item_sk
                          AND sr.sr_ticket_number = ss.ss_ticket_number
                          AND ss.ss_sales_price >= 0.80 * ss.ss_list_price
                          AND ss.ss_sales_price <= 1.00 * ss.ss_list_price
INNER JOIN customer c ON ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
INNER JOIN ca_filtered ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
INNER JOIN hd_filtered hd ON c.c_current_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
INNER JOIN web_sales ws ON ss.ss_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
                        AND sr.sr_item_sk = ws.ws_item_sk
INNER JOIN date_dim d2 ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
                       AND d2.d_date BETWEEN d1.d_date AND d1.end_date;
